rationale: Top-of-form Maine-registered name (domestic nonprofit).

label_verbatim: FIRST: This certificate was adopted by a majority of the ("X" one box only) [ ] members
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'members' for the FIRST adopting-body election.

label_verbatim: FIRST: This certificate was adopted by a majority of the ("X" one box only) [ ] members
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'directors' for the FIRST adopting-body election.

Date the certificate was adopted by the chosen body. Same form-scoped key family as MBCA-14A's resumption.meeting_date but generalized — on this nonprofit form, the date applies whether the action was at a meeting OR by written consent (the FIRST 'on (date) at (location)' line is rendered before the meeting/consent radio).

Location where the adoption occurred. Required when resumption.method='meeting'; conventionally captures the location of execution when resumption.method='written_consent' (some filers leave blank for written consent — see open_questions).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ("X" one box only) [ ] at a meeting legally called and held
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'meeting'. Same key family as CORP_MBCA-14A.resumption.method.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ("X" one box only) [ ] at a meeting legally called and held
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'written_consent'. Same key family as CORP_MBCA-14A.resumption.method.

label_verbatim: SECOND: It is hereby certified that a majority of the ("X" one box only) [ ] members have voted to resume carrying on activities.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'members' for the SECOND voting-body certification. In practice should match resumption.adopting_body (rubric cross-check).

label_verbatim: SECOND: It is hereby certified that a majority of the ("X" one box only) [ ] members have voted to resume carrying on activities.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'directors'. Should match resumption.adopting_body.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The address of the registered office of the corporation in the State of Maine is ___
rationale: First (inline) line of the registered-office address. Two-widget free-text field follows the MARK1 .line{1,2} convention. Widget rect [414,278..576,294] is the short inline blank to the right of the THIRD recital.

label_verbatim: THIRD: ___ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Second (continuation) full-width line of the registered-office address. Widget rect [107,252..578,270] spans the full width below line1. The label '(street, city, state and zip code)' is shared between both widgets — treat as a single logical address split across two widgets.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ("X" one box only) [ ] public benefit corporation
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'public_benefit'. Same canonical key as NP_MNPCA-6.entity.nonprofit_type — every Maine nonprofit-corporation form classifies under this enum.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ("X" one box only) [ ] public benefit corporation
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'mutual_benefit'. Same canonical key as NP_MNPCA-6.entity.nonprofit_type.
Signature-row date on left of page 1.

Primary signer (Shape D — combined name+capacity). Per page-1 footnote * the document MUST be signed by any authorized officer per 13-B MRSA §104.1.B. The (signature) line above this widget is wet-ink only.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) [second block]
rationale: Second signer slot (Shape D). The page lays out two parallel *By blocks. Same convention as NP_MNPCA-6A_0 — when the action was adopted by member vote, the clerk/secretary's attestation in the MUST-BE-COMPLETED-FOR-VOTE-OF-MEMBERS box is satisfied by wet-ink in that box; this Text16 widget is for an additional officer co-signing. May be left empty when only one officer signs.
